reason: This finding involves modifying bootloader configuration (GRUB2), which is explicitly categorized as too dangerous to remediate due to the high risk of system unbootability if changes are applied incorrectly. Bootloader modifications can lead to permanent lockout from the system, requiring physical access or recovery procedures.
estimated_impact: reboot required; authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; boot_lockout; system_unbootable; critical_service_disruption
